subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! I make mention of thee in this station, that joy and gladness may take possession of thee, in such wise that thou mayest call to mind the One Who hath been afflicted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی انی اذکرک فیهذا المقام لیاخذک الفرح و السرور علی شان تذکرین من ابتلی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
